message.content: <local-command-caveat>Caveat: The messages below were generated by the user while running local commands. DO NOT respond to these messages or otherwise consider them in your response unless the user explicitly asks you to.</local-command-caveat>
websearch an excellent phone number to reach U.S. Bank's credit card services division

addedBlocks:
## vvx
Job Jockey Kit - MCP tools for project initiative management

attachment.content:
- rbk-prep-release: Prepare release candidate for upstream delivery
- vvc-BREAK-LOCK: Force-break a stuck VVC lock after a crash.
- vvc-commit: Guarded git commit
- cma-prep-pr: Prepare branch for upstream PR contribution
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

aiTitle: Find U.S. Bank credit card services phone number

input.query: U.S. Bank credit card services customer service phone number

content.content:
Web search results for query: "U.S. Bank credit card services customer service phone number"

Links: [{"title":"Credit card customer service | Helping you navigate | U.S. Bank","url":"https://www.usbank.com/customer-service/personal-banking/credit-cards.html"},{"title":"U.S. Bank | Business Credit Card Contact Us","url":"https://www.usbank.com/business-banking/business-credit-cards/business-credit-card-contact-us.html"},{"title":"How can I talk to U.S. Bank credit card customer service?","url":"https://wallethub.com/answers/cc/us-bank-customer-service-1000291-2140780150/"},{"title":"Customer service | U.S. Bank","url":"https://www.usbank.com/customer-service.html"},{"title":"Tips for contacting U.S. Bank with a credit card problem | Cornell University Division of Financial Services","url":"https://finance.cornell.edu/ssc/news/tips-contacting-us-bank-credit-card-problem"},{"title":"Contact Us - US Bank ReliaCard","url":"https://www.usbankreliacard.com/contact-us"},{"title":"What's the collect number for Cardmember Service (credit cards)?","url":"https://www.usbank.com/customer-service/knowledge-base/KB0072919.html"},{"title":"How do I contact customer service for U.S. Bank?","url":"https://www.usbank.com/customer-service/knowledge-base/KB0069914.html"},{"title":"U.S. Bank’s 24-Hour Customer Service - Concur | The University of Alabama","url":"https://concur.ua.edu/2024/06/05/u-s-banks-24-hour-customer-service/"},{"title":"How do I check the status of my credit card application?","url":"https://www.usbank.com/customer-service/knowledge-base/KB0069779.html"}]

Based on the search results, here are the U.S. Bank credit card customer service phone numbers:

**Main Credit Card Customer Service:**
Call 800-285-8585 or use the phone number on the back of your card

**Additional Contact Numbers:**
- Customer Service: 800-344-5696
- Credit Card Application Status: 800-947-1444 (Monday-Friday, 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. CT)
- Collect number for Personal Credit Cards: 701-461-1502 (24 hours a day)

When calling, you can use an automated phone system or say "agent" to speak with a representative.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

**Main Credit Card Customer Service:**
Call 800-285-8585 or use the phone number on the back of your card

**Additional Contact Numbers:**
- Customer Service: 800-344-5696
- Credit Card Application Status: 800-947-1444 (Monday-Friday, 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. CT)

content.text:
Here are good phone numbers to reach U.S. Bank's credit card services:

**Personal Credit Card Customer Service:** **800-285-8585** (or use the number on the back of your card)

**Other useful numbers:**
- General Customer Service: **800-344-5696**
- Credit Card Application Status: **800-947-1444** (Mon–Fri, 8 a.m.–5 p.m. CT)
- Collect (from outside the U.S., 24/7): **701-461-1502**

Tip: when you reach the automated system, just say "agent" to get to a human representative faster.

Sources:
- [Credit card customer service | U.S. Bank](https://www.usbank.com/customer-service/personal-banking/credit-cards.html)
- [How do I contact customer service for U.S. Bank?](https://www.usbank.com/customer-service/knowledge-base/KB0069914.html)
- [What's the collect number for Cardmember Service (credit cards)?](https://www.usbank.com/customer-service/knowledge-base/KB0072919.html)
- [How can I talk to U.S. Bank credit card customer service? (WalletHub)](https://wallethub.com/answers/cc/us-bank-customer-service-1000291-2140780150/)
- [Tips for contacting U.S. Bank with a credit card problem (Cornell)](https://finance.cornell.edu/ssc/news/tips-contacting-us-bank-credit-card-problem)

Links: [{"title":"Credit card customer service | Helping you navigate | U.S. Bank","url":"https://www.usbank.com/customer-service/personal-banking/credit-cards.html"},{"title":"U.S. Bank | Business Credit Card Contact Us","url":"https://www.usbank.com/business-banking/business-credit-cards/business-credit-card-contact-us.html"},{"title":"Customer service | U.S. Bank","url":"https://www.usbank.com/customer-service.html"},{"title":"What's the customer service address for credit card accounts?","url":"https://www.usbank.com/customer-service/knowledge-base/KB0207229.html"},{"title":"How do I contact customer service for U.S. Bank?","url":"https://www.usbank.com/customer-service/knowledge-base/KB0069914.html.html"},{"title":"What's the collect number for Cardmember Service (credit cards)?","url":"https://www.usbank.com/customer-service/knowledge-base/KB0072919.html"},{"title":"Contact us | Corporate payment systems and card solutions","url":"https://www.usbank.com/corporate-and-commercial-banking/treasury-payment-solutions/corporate-payment-services/contact-us.html"},{"title":"Who do I contact about a credit card settlement?","url":"https://www.usbank.com/customer-service/knowledge-base/KB0205923.html"},{"title":"What is the number for the U.S. Bank Focus card customer service?","url":"https://www.usbank.com/customer-service/knowledge-base/KB0069863.html"},{"title":"How do I check the status of my credit card application?","url":"https://www.usbank.com/customer-service/knowledge-base/KB0069779.html"}]

Based on the search results from U.S. Bank's website, here are the credit card customer service phone numbers:

**For Personal Credit Cards:**
The main credit card customer service number is 800-285-8585, or you can call the phone number on the back of your card.

**For Business Credit Cards:**
The business cardmember service number is 866-485-4545.

**General Customer Service:**
You can also reach U.S. Bank's general customer service line at 800-USBANKS (872-2657), available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.

**Specialty Services:**
- For the U.S. Bank Focus Card, cardholders can reach services at 877-474-0010.
- For calling collect, use 701-461-1502 for personal credit cards or 701-461-0346 for business credit cards.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

aiTitle: Find U.S. Bank credit card services phone number

input.prompt: List all phone numbers shown on this page for credit card customer service, including hours and what each number is for.

content.content:
# U.S. Bank Credit Card Customer Service Phone Numbers

## Main Cardmember Service Lines

**800-285-8585** - "U.S. Bank Altitude® Go Visa Signature®, Altitude® Connect Visa Signature®, Shopper Cash Rewards™ Visa Signature, Cash+® Visa Signature, Cash Rewards, Perks+, Platinum, College and Secured Visa® Cards"

**844-357-2015** - U.S. Bank Altitude® Reserve Visa Infinite® Card

**844-303-8122** - U.S. Bank Cash 365™ American Express®

**888-444-BANK** - U.S. Bank Premier Line

**888-852-5786** - U.S. Bank Credit-Line

**866-311-5550** - FlexPerks® Gold, Select+, and Travel Rewards American Express® Cards

**877-978-7446** - FlexPerks® Travel Rewards Visa Signature® Card

**800-692-8472** - FlexPerks® Select Rewards Visa® Card

## Specialized Lines

**800-947-1444** - Application status inquiries (Monday-Friday, 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. CT)

**888-229-8864** - Rewards Center

**866-821-8411** - To report unauthorized activity

**800-530-9454** - U.S. Bank Offer Verification

content.text:
Verified directly from U.S. Bank's official customer service page:

**Main personal credit card line:** **800-285-8585** — covers Altitude Go, Altitude Connect, Cash+, Cash Rewards, Perks+, Platinum, College, and Secured Visa cards.

**Other lines on usbank.com:**
- **844-357-2015** — Altitude Reserve Visa Infinite
- **844-303-8122** — Cash 365 American Express
- **866-311-5550** — FlexPerks Gold / Select+ / Travel Rewards Amex
- **877-978-7446** — FlexPerks Travel Rewards Visa Signature
- **800-947-1444** — Application status (Mon–Fri, 8a–5p CT)
- **866-821-8411** — Report unauthorized activity
- **866-485-4545** — Business credit cards

The safest practice is always to call the number printed on the back of your card — that's U.S. Bank's own official guidance.

Sources:
- [Credit card customer service — U.S. Bank (official)](https://www.usbank.com/customer-service/personal-banking/credit-cards.html)
- [Business Credit Card Contact Us — U.S. Bank](https://www.usbank.com/business-banking/business-credit-cards/business-credit-card-contact-us.html)
- [Customer service — U.S. Bank](https://www.usbank.com/customer-service.html)
